note: Anonymous root → 302 to /sign-in (per apps/web/src/middleware.ts onboarding+anon redirect)
Anonymous → 302 to /sign-in (the gate runs only for signed-in unboarded users)
Anonymous → 401 UNAUTHENTICATED; story #941 fixed the prior 500 regression. NOT 500.
Anonymous → 404 per AC-2/AC-3 SSR non-enumeration gate (PR #940)
Dev-only seam: mints a Clerk sign-in ticket and redirects through Clerk's ticket flow. Hard-refuses in production. Skipped when CLERK_SECRET_KEY is unset (e.g. fork PRs)
